articles.title: Derrick White talks beer, being a Bostonian, and a promising Celtics playoff run
articles.description:
"When you put on that Celtic uniform, you're kind of judged on one thing."

The post Derrick White talks beer, being a Bostonian, and a promising Celtics playoff run appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Derrick White emphasizes the pride of wearing the Celtics uniform during playoffs.
White discusses his connection to Boston and local beer, specifically Samuel Adams.
Celtics' playoff performance could boost local morale and community engagement.

articles.title: Mike Krzyzewski threw a subtle jab at Bill Belichick in response to new UNC hire
articles.description:
"They had an NFL champ hired as the coach and Duke beat Carolina in football this year ... there's time for adjustments."

The post Mike Krzyzewski threw a subtle jab at Bill Belichick in response to new UNC hire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mike Krzyzewski commented on Bill Belichick's coaching decisions regarding UNC's new hire.
Duke defeated Carolina in football this year, highlighting competitive tensions.
Boston residents may feel increased rivalry between local sports teams and college programs.

articles.title: Person stabs dog in Milton during alleged attack
articles.description:
The dog was taken to a local vet, State Police said.

The post Person stabs dog in Milton during alleged attack appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A person stabbed a dog in Milton during an alleged attack.
The injured dog was taken to a local vet for treatment.
State Police are investigating the incident for potential charges.
